project_name: Ambission Industries - CRM Sales Reports Dashboard
theme_strategy: Minimalist corporate/enterprise style. Light mode default with dark mode toggle. Data-heavy, high-density, analytical.

typography.font_weights: Radical weight contrast (e.g., Black 900 vs Light 300).
rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serifs for headings. They smell like templates.
Headlines (>32px) MUST use tight letter spacing: 'tracking-tight' or 'tracking-tighter'.
Overlines/Labels (like 'TOTAL SALES' or 'AVG TICKET') MUST be Uppercase, Tiny, and Wide Spacing ('text-xs tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold').
Line Height: 'leading-none' for KPIs and headers, 'leading-relaxed' for body text in tables.
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for tabular data to ensure precise numeral alignment.

colors.description: Functional, rigid, objective. Color is function only. The UI should be primarily monochrome (Zinc/Slate) with a sharp, vibrant primary color (Denim/Indigo) used sparingly to guide action and visualize data.

rules: Span Logic: Summary KPIs ('col-span-1'). Primary Data/Charts ('col-span-2 row-span-2' or 'col-span-3'). Lists/Rankings ('col-span-1 row-span-2').
Every pixel utilized. Use 'h-full' on children to ensure they stretch. No jagged bottoms.
Generous Spacing inside containers: Use 'p-6' or 'p-8' inside dashboard cards to prevent text collision with borders.

surface_and_components.style: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) mixed with Sharp Corporate Minimalism
surface_and_components.cards: Cardless or flat solid background with 1px border ('border-border'). Max border-radius: 4px ('rounded-sm') or 0px ('rounded-none'). NO soft shadows.
surface_and_components.hover_states: Slight lift ('-translate-y-[1px]'), subtle shadow ('shadow-sm'), border color darkens.
surface_and_components.headers: Solid background with a hard bottom border. Sticky positioning. Must contain the global filters (Date Range, Store/Brand select).
surface_and_components.tables: Clean, dense. 1px subtle border on bottom of rows ('border-b border-border/40'). No side borders. Striped rows on hover ('hover:bg-muted/50').
surface_and_components.buttons: Sharp edges ('rounded-sm'), strong contrast. Export buttons (PDF/Excel) should be 'variant="outline"' or ghost with an icon.
surface_and_components.shadcn_overrides: Override default Vercel-look. Reduce border-radius to 2px or 4px. Use sharp, flat interactions. DO NOT use generic soft shadows.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Minimalist. Use micro-interactions for feedback. Avoid large scale bounce/spring animations. Keep it professional.
rules: Hover states on all interactive elements: MUST explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., 'hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white').
Transition effects: Use specific properties, NOT 'transition: all' (e.g., 'transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out').
Focus states: Must have HIGHER contrast than default state.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Large text 3:1, normal text 4.5:1.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case, role-based, NOT appearance-based).
accessibility.charts: Provide tooltips on Recharts with readable contrast (solid bg, sharp border). If possible, use patterns or distinct hues for color-blind friendliness.

media_and_assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for clean, neutral corporate icons. Use 'iconoir-react' if you want a thinner, sharper tech look. Install command: 'yarn add iconoir-react'.

images_for_empty_states_or_placeholders.description: Clean, modern clothing rack. Use for empty state or general cover image.
Neatly arranged shirts on a rack. Can be used for store location thumbnail.

rules: DO NOT use 3D pie charts or heavy gradients in charts.
Lines/Bars: Flat colors, sharp corners (radius 0 on bars).
Axes: Mute axis lines ('stroke-muted'). Remove unnecessary grid lines or use sparse dashed lines ('stroke-dasharray="3 3"').
Tooltips: Custom content wrapper with 'bg-background border-border shadow-sm rounded-sm p-3'.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where applicable, like sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style. (For this dashboard, use sharp edges: rounded-sm or rounded-none).
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component is located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Tech Stack: React JS (NOT TS), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Recharts, Vite.
File Extension: Create '.jsx' or '.js' files. DO NOT USE TYPE ANNOTATIONS.
Theme Provider: Implement a robust Light/Dark theme provider that toggles the '.dark' class on the HTML document element.
Layout Structure: Create a Sidebar (fixed width, border-r) and Main Content area (flex-1). The header should be sticky with a glassmorphism backdrop.

Data Mocking: Since the backend is a read-only PostgreSQL FastAPI, mock the API responses in the frontend for now to visualize the POS sales data correctly. Structure the data carefully with fields: id, date, total, marca, tipo, store, client, etc.
Export: Mock the export functionality with a sonner toast saying 'Exporting PDF...' or 'Exporting Excel...'.
Shadcn Forms/Select: Use these for the date range picker, brand (marca) filter, and store filter in the header.
CRITICAL: Do not use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
CRITICAL: Ensure every component has a 'data-testid' for testing.
